headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid AKAM and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Akamai Technologies has been on fire lately. In the past six months alone, the company’s stock price has rocketed 51.4%, reaching $114.84 per share. This performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: Akamai Streamlines Public Sector Technology Acquisition with New State of Montana Data Communications Contract
summary: New contract vehicle provides government and education customers a pre-competed, competitive alternative to expiring NASPO ValuePoint agreementsCAMBRIDGE, Mass., April 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Akamai (NASDAQ: AKAM) today announced that the State of Montana awarded the company a new data communications contract vehicle. The agreement streamlines how state and local agencies, as well as educational institutions, can acquire Akamai’s industry-leading security and cloud computing solutions. Publ
